title: 周末你有什么打算
title_english: What's your plan for the weekend

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Zhōumò nǐ yǒu shénme dǎsuàn?
lines.english: What's your plan for the weekend?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我早就想好了，请你吃饭、看电影。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zǎojiù xiǎnghǎo le, qǐng nǐ chīfàn, kàn diànyǐng.
lines.english: I've already planned it - treating you to dinner and a movie.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Qǐng wǒ?
lines.english: Treat me?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是啊，我已经找好饭馆了，电影票也买好了。
lines.pinyin: Shì a, wǒ yǐjīng zhǎohǎo fànguǎn le, diànyǐngpiào yě mǎihǎo le.
lines.english: Yes, I've found a restaurant and bought the movie tickets.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我还没想好要不要跟你去呢。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ hái méi xiǎnghǎo yào bu yào gēn nǐ qù ne.
lines.english: I haven't decided yet if I want to go with you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你一直玩儿电脑游戏，作业写完了吗?
lines.pinyin: Nǐ yīzhí wánr diànnǎo yóuxì, zuòyè xiěwán le ma?
lines.english: You keep playing computer games, have you finished your homework?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Dōu xiěwán le.
lines.english: All finished.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 明天不是有考试吗?你怎么一点儿也不着急?
lines.pinyin: Míngtiān bú shì yǒu kǎoshì ma? Nǐ zěnme yīdiǎnr yě bù zháojí?
lines.english: Don't you have a test tomorrow? Why aren't you worried at all?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zǎojiù fùxí hǎo le.
lines.english: I finished reviewing long ago.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nà yě bù néng yīzhí wánr a.
lines.english: But you still shouldn't play all the time.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 下个月我去旅游，你能跟我一起去吗?
lines.pinyin: Xià gè yuè wǒ qù lǚyóu, nǐ néng gēn wǒ yīqǐ qù ma?
lines.english: I'm going traveling next month, can you come with me?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我还没想好呢。你觉得哪儿最好玩儿?
lines.pinyin: Wǒ hái méi xiǎnghǎo ne. Nǐ juéde nǎr zuì hǎowánr?
lines.english: I haven't decided yet. Where do you think is most fun?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 南方啊，我们去年就是这个时候去的。
lines.pinyin: Nánfāng a, wǒmen qùnián jiùshì zhège shíhou qù de.
lines.english: The South. We went at this time last year.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 南方太热了，北方好一些，不冷也不热。
lines.pinyin: Nánfāng tài rè le, běifāng hǎo yīxiē, bù lěng yě bú rè.
lines.english: The South is too hot. The North is better - neither cold nor hot.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 水果、面包、茶都准备好了，我们还带什么?
lines.pinyin: Shuǐguǒ, miànbāo, chá dōu zhǔnbèi hǎo le, wǒmen hái dài shénme?
lines.english: Fruits, bread, and tea are all ready. What else should we bring?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 手机、电脑、地图，一个也不能少。
lines.pinyin: Shǒujī, diànnǎo, dìtú, yī gè yě bù néng shǎo.
lines.english: Phone, computer, map - we can't miss any of them.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 这些我昨天下午就准备好了。
lines.pinyin: Zhèxiē wǒ zuótiān xiàwǔ jiù zhǔnbèi hǎo le.
lines.english: I prepared these yesterday afternoon.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Zài duō dài jǐ jiàn yīfu ba.
lines.english: Let's bring a few more clothes.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我们是去旅游，不是搬家，还是少带一些吧。
lines.pinyin: Wǒmen shì qù lǚyóu, bú shì bānjiā, háishi shǎo dài yīxiē ba.
lines.english: We're traveling, not moving house. Let's bring less.

title: 他什么时候回来
title_english: When will he come back

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Xiūxi yīxià ba.
lines.english: Let's rest a bit.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Zěnme le?
lines.english: What's wrong?

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Wǒ xiànzài tuǐ yě téng, jiǎo yě téng.
lines.english: Now my legs and feet hurt.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 好，那边树多，我们过去坐一会儿。
lines.pinyin: Hǎo, nàbiān shù duō, wǒmen guòqù zuò yīhuìr.
lines.english: Okay, there are many trees over there, let's go sit for a while.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 上来的时候我怎么没觉得这么累?
lines.pinyin: Shànglái de shíhou wǒ zěnme méi juéde zhème lèi?
lines.english: Why didn't I feel this tired when coming up?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 上山容易下山难，你不知道?
lines.pinyin: Shàngshān róngyì xiàshān nán, nǐ bù zhīdào?
lines.english: Going up is easy, coming down is hard. Don't you know?

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Wéi, nǐ hǎo, qǐngwèn Zhōu Míng zài ma?
lines.english: Hello, is Zhou Ming there?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 周经理出去了，不在办公室。
lines.pinyin: Zhōu jīnglǐ chūqù le, bú zài bàngōngshì.
lines.english: Manager Zhou went out, he's not in the office.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 他去哪儿了?什么时候回来?
lines.pinyin: Tā qù nǎr le? Shénme shíhou huílái?
lines.english: Where did he go? When will he be back?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 他出去办事了，下午回来。
lines.pinyin: Tā chūqù bànshì le, xiàwǔ huílái.
lines.english: He went to handle business, he'll be back in the afternoon.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 回来了就让他给我打个电话。
lines.pinyin: Huílái le jiù ràng tā gěi wǒ dǎ gè diànhuà.
lines.english: When he returns, have him call me.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 好的，他到了办公室我就告诉他。
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, tā dào le bàngōngshì wǒ jiù gàosu tā.
lines.english: Okay, I'll tell him when he arrives at the office.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 雨下得真大。你怎么回去?我送你吧。
lines.pinyin: Yǔ xià de zhēn dà. Nǐ zěnme huíqu? Wǒ sòng nǐ ba.
lines.english: The rain is heavy. How will you get back? Let me take you.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 没事，我出去叫辆出租车就行了。
lines.pinyin: Méishì, wǒ chūqù jiào liàng chūzūchē jiù xíng le.
lines.english: It's okay, I'll just call a taxi.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 那你等等，我上楼去给你拿把伞。
lines.pinyin: Nà nǐ děngdeng, wǒ shànglóu qù gěi nǐ ná bǎ sǎn.
lines.english: Wait a bit, I'll go upstairs to get an umbrella for you.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 好的。我跟你一起上去吧。
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de. Wǒ gēn nǐ yīqǐ shàngqù ba.
lines.english: Okay. I'll go up with you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你在这儿等吧，我拿了伞就下来。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zài zhèr děng ba, wǒ ná le sǎn jiù xiàlái.
lines.english: You wait here, I'll come down after getting the umbrella.

title: 天黑了，我们回去吧
title_pinyin: Tiān hēi le, wǒmen huíqu ba
title_english: It's getting dark, let's go back

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Tiān hēi le, wǒmen huíqu ba.
lines.english: It's getting dark, let's go back.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 还早呢，再玩儿一会儿吧。
lines.pinyin: Hái zǎo ne, zài wánr yīhuìr ba.
lines.english: It's still early, let's play a bit more.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 刚才天气预报说晚上有雨。
lines.pinyin: Gāngcái tiānqì yùbào shuō wǎnshang yǒu yǔ.
lines.english: The weather forecast just said there will be rain tonight.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Nà wǒmen kuài zǒu ba.
lines.english: Really? Then let's go quickly.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ kànjiàn wǒ de yàoshi le ma?
lines.english: Have you seen my keys?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Méiyǒu, nǐ zhǎozhao bāo lǐ.
lines.english: No, check inside your bag.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zhǎoguò le, méiyǒu.
lines.english: I already looked, they're not there.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是不是落在刚才那个饭馆了？
lines.pinyin: Shì bu shì là zài gāngcái nàge fànguǎn le?
lines.english: Did you leave them at that restaurant we were just at?

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Duì, yǒu kěnéng. Wǒ huíqu zhǎozhao.
lines.english: Right, possibly. I'll go back and look.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我们都走了两个小时了，累不累？
lines.pinyin: Wǒmen dōu zǒu le liǎng gè xiǎoshí le, lèi bu lèi?
lines.english: We've been walking for two hours, are you tired?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Bú lèi, fēngjǐng tài měi le.
lines.english: Not tired, the scenery is too beautiful.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 前面有个超市，我们去买点儿水吧。
lines.pinyin: Qiánmiàn yǒu gè chāoshì, wǒmen qù mǎi diǎnr shuǐ ba.
lines.english: There's a supermarket ahead, let's go buy some water.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Hǎo, shùnbiàn mǎi diǎnr shuǐguǒ.
lines.english: Okay, let's also buy some fruit.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 这个房间有点儿黑，能不能换个亮一点儿的？
lines.pinyin: Zhège fángjiān yǒu diǎnr hēi, néng bu néng huàn gè liàng yīdiǎnr de?
lines.english: This room is a bit dark, can we change to a brighter one?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 没问题，您看这个怎么样？
lines.pinyin: Méi wèntí, nín kàn zhège zěnmeyàng?
lines.english: No problem, how about this one?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 这个不错，比那个亮多了。
lines.pinyin: Zhège búcuò, bǐ nàge liàng duō le.
lines.english: This one is nice, much brighter than that one.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, nà jiù zhège ba.
lines.english: Okay, let's go with this one then.

title: 你怎么才来
title_english: Why are you so late

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你怎么才来？电影都快开始了。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zěnme cái lái? Diànyǐng dōu kuài kāishǐ le.
lines.english: Why are you just arriving? The movie is about to start.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Bù hǎoyìsi, lùshang dǔchē le.
lines.english: Sorry, there was a traffic jam on the way.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ yīnggāi zǎo diǎnr chūmén.
lines.english: You should have left earlier.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我知道，下次一定早点儿。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zhīdào, xià cì yídìng zǎo diǎnr.
lines.english: I know, next time I definitely will.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我们约好九点见面，你怎么十点才来？
lines.pinyin: Wǒmen yuēhǎo jiǔ diǎn jiànmiàn, nǐ zěnme shí diǎn cái lái?
lines.english: We agreed to meet at nine, why did you come at ten?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Duìbuqǐ, wǒ qǐ wǎn le.
lines.english: Sorry, I woke up late.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你总是这样，以后不约你了。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zǒngshì zhèyàng, yǐhòu bù yuē nǐ le.
lines.english: You're always like this, I won't invite you anymore.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 别生气，我请你吃早饭吧。
lines.pinyin: Bié shēngqì, wǒ qǐng nǐ chī zǎofàn ba.
lines.english: Don't be angry, let me treat you to breakfast.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zěnme cái lái jiē wǒ?
lines.english: Why are you so late picking me up?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我早就到了，在找停车位。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zǎojiù dào le, zài zhǎo tíngchēwèi.
lines.english: I arrived early, I was looking for a parking spot.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Zhǎo le zhème jiǔ?
lines.english: For that long?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 这里的车太多了，好不容易才找到。
lines.pinyin: Zhèlǐ de chē tài duō le, hǎo bù róngyì cái zhǎodào.
lines.english: There were too many cars here, it wasn't easy to find one.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Fàn zěnme hái méi zuò hǎo?
lines.english: Why isn't the food ready yet?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Bié zháojí, mǎshàng jiù hǎo.
lines.english: Don't worry, it'll be ready soon.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Wǒ dōu è sǐ le.
lines.english: I'm starving.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Zài děng wǔ fēnzhōng ba.
lines.english: Wait another five minutes.

title: 你吃过中药吗
title_english: Have you ever taken Chinese medicine

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ chīguò zhōngyào ma?
lines.english: Have you ever taken Chinese medicine?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 吃过，小时候感冒的时候喝过。
lines.pinyin: Chīguò, xiǎoshíhou gǎnmào de shíhou hēguò.
lines.english: Yes, I drank it when I had a cold as a child.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Zhōngyào kǔ bu kǔ?
lines.english: Is Chinese medicine bitter?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Yǒu diǎnr kǔ, dànshì hěn yǒuxiào.
lines.english: A bit bitter, but very effective.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zuìjìn shēntǐ zěnmeyàng?
lines.english: How's your health recently?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Bú tài hǎo, zǒngshì tóuténg.
lines.english: Not great, I always have headaches.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ qù yīyuàn kànguò le ma?
lines.english: Have you been to the hospital to check?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 看过了，医生说多休息就好了。
lines.pinyin: Kànguò le, yīshēng shuō duō xiūxi jiù hǎo le.
lines.english: Yes, the doctor said resting more will help.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ gǎnmào hǎo le ma?
lines.english: Is your cold better?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Hái méi hǎo, hái zài késou.
lines.english: Not yet, I'm still coughing.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Chī yào le ma?
lines.english: Have you taken medicine?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Chī le, dàn hǎoxiàng méi shénme yòng.
lines.english: Yes, but it doesn't seem to help much.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我最近睡眠不好，你有什么建议吗？
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zuìjìn shuìmián bù hǎo, nǐ yǒu shénme jiànyì ma?
lines.english: I haven't been sleeping well lately, do you have any suggestions?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 你可以试试睡前喝杯牛奶。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ shìshi shuìqián hē bēi niúnǎi.
lines.english: You can try drinking a glass of milk before bed.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Shìguò le, xiàoguǒ bú tài hǎo.
lines.english: I tried, it didn't work very well.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 那就去看医生吧，开点儿药。
lines.pinyin: Nà jiù qù kàn yīshēng ba, kāi diǎnr yào.
lines.english: Then go see a doctor, get some medicine prescribed.

title: 我只会说一点儿汉语
title_pinyin: Wǒ zhǐ huì shuō yīdiǎnr Hànyǔ
title_english: I can only speak a little Chinese

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ huì shuō Hànyǔ ma?
lines.english: Can you speak Chinese?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zhǐ huì shuō yīdiǎnr Hànyǔ.
lines.english: I can only speak a little Chinese.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ xué le duō cháng shíjiān le?
lines.english: How long have you been studying?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒ xué le sān gè yuè le.
lines.english: I've been studying for three months.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 除了英语，你还会说什么语言？
lines.pinyin: Chúle Yīngyǔ, nǐ hái huì shuō shénme yǔyán?
lines.english: Besides English, what other languages can you speak?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒ hái huì yīdiǎnr Fǎyǔ.
lines.english: I can also speak a little French.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ de Fǎyǔ zěnmeyàng?
lines.english: How's your French?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 一般般，只会说简单的句子。
lines.pinyin: Yībānbān, zhǐ huì shuō jiǎndān de jùzi.
lines.english: So-so, I can only speak simple sentences.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ huì bu huì zuò Zhōngguó cài?
lines.english: Can you cook Chinese food?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 会一点儿，我会做西红柿炒鸡蛋。
lines.pinyin: Huì yīdiǎnr, wǒ huì zuò Xīhóngshì chǎo jīdàn.
lines.english: A little, I can make tomato and egg stir-fry.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Zhè dào cài hěn hǎo zuò.
lines.english: That dish is easy to make.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Shì de, érqiě hěn hǎochī.
lines.english: Yes, and it's delicious.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ huì dǎ pīngpāngqiú ma?
lines.english: Can you play ping pong?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Bú huì, dànshì wǒ huì dǎ lánqiú.
lines.english: No, but I can play basketball.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我们下次一起去打篮球吧。
lines.pinyin: Wǒmen xià cì yīqǐ qù dǎ lánqiú ba.
lines.english: Let's go play basketball together next time.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, méi wèntí.
lines.english: Okay, no problem.

title: 你喝茶还是喝咖啡
title_pinyin: Nǐ hē chá háishì hē kāfēi
title_english: Do you drink tea or coffee

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ hē chá háishì hē kāfēi?
lines.english: Do you drink tea or coffee?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒ hē chá ba.
lines.english: I'll have tea.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Hóngchá háishì lǜchá?
lines.english: Black tea or green tea?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Lǜchá, xièxie.
lines.english: Green tea, thanks.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你是去北京还是去上海？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ shì qù Běijīng háishì qù Shànghǎi?
lines.english: Are you going to Beijing or Shanghai?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒ liǎng gè dìfang dōu xiǎng qù.
lines.english: I want to go to both places.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nà nǐ xiān qù nǎge?
lines.english: Then which one will you go to first?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Xiān qù Běijīng, zài qù Shànghǎi.
lines.english: Beijing first, then Shanghai.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你喜欢看电影还是看书？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ xǐhuan kàn diànyǐng háishì kàn shū?
lines.english: Do you like watching movies or reading books?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒ gèng xǐhuan kàn shū.
lines.english: I prefer reading books.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ xǐhuan kàn shénme shū?
lines.english: What kind of books do you like?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我喜欢看小说，特别是中国的历史小说。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuan kàn xiǎoshuō, tèbié shì Zhōngguó de lìshǐ xiǎoshuō.
lines.english: I like novels, especially Chinese historical novels.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你是坐火车去还是坐飞机去？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ shì zuò huǒchē qù háishì zuò fēijī qù?
lines.english: Are you going by train or by plane?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Zuò huǒchē, bǐjiào piányi.
lines.english: By train, it's cheaper.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Dànshì fēijī bǐjiào kuài.
lines.english: But flying is faster.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我不着急，坐火车可以看风景。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ bù zháojí, zuò huǒchē kěyǐ kàn fēngjǐng.
lines.english: I'm not in a hurry, on the train I can see the scenery.

title: 你们公司有多少人
title_english: How many people are in your company

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐmen gōngsī yǒu duōshǎo rén?
lines.english: How many people are in your company?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒmen gōngsī yǒu sānbǎi duō rén.
lines.english: Our company has more than 300 people.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Shì gè dà gōngsī a.
lines.english: That's a big company.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Hái kěyǐ, bú suàn hěn dà.
lines.english: It's okay, not considered very big.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zài nǎge bùmén gōngzuò?
lines.english: Which department do you work in?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zài shìchǎng bù.
lines.english: I'm in the marketing department.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Shìchǎng bù yǒu duōshǎo rén?
lines.english: How many people are in marketing?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Èrshí gè rén zuǒyòu.
lines.english: Around twenty people.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ měitiān gōngzuò jǐ gè xiǎoshí?
lines.english: How many hours do you work each day?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 八个小日，从九点到六点。
lines.pinyin: Bā gè xiǎoshí, cóng jiǔ diǎn dào liù diǎn.
lines.english: Eight hours, from nine to six.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Zhōngwǔ xiūxi duō cháng shíjiān?
lines.english: How long is the lunch break?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 一个小时，可以在公司吃饭。
lines.pinyin: Yī gè xiǎoshí, kěyǐ zài gōngsī chīfàn.
lines.english: One hour, we can eat at the company.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐmen gōngsī jīngcháng jiābān ma?
lines.english: Does your company often work overtime?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 有时候需要加班，但不太多。
lines.pinyin: Yǒu shíhou xūyào jiābān, dàn bú tài duō.
lines.english: Sometimes we need to, but not too often.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Jiābān yǒu jiābānfèi ma?
lines.english: Is there overtime pay?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 有的，公司按规定给加班费。
lines.pinyin: Yǒu de, gōngsī àn guīdìng gěi jiābānfèi.
lines.english: Yes, the company gives overtime pay according to regulations.

title: 她长得什么样
title_english: What does she look like

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Tā zhǎng de shénme yàng?
lines.english: What does she look like?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Tā gèzi hěn gāo, hěn piàoliang.
lines.english: She's tall and very pretty.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 她的头发是长的还是短的？
lines.pinyin: Tā de tóufa shì cháng de háishì duǎn de?
lines.english: Is her hair long or short?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Cháng fà, hēisè de.
lines.english: Long, black hair.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ kànjiàn nàge rén le ma?
lines.english: Did you see that person?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Nǎge rén?
lines.english: Which person?

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Chuān hóng yīfu de nàge rén.
lines.english: The person wearing red clothes.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 看见了，他长得有点儿胖。
lines.pinyin: Kànjiàn le, tā zhǎng de yǒu diǎnr pàng.
lines.english: Yes, he's a bit fat.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zhǎng de duō gāo?
lines.english: How tall are you?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Yī mǐ qībā.
lines.english: One meter seventy-eight.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ bǐ wǒ gāo.
lines.english: You're taller than me.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Nǐ duō gāo?
lines.english: How tall are you?

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yī mǐ qīwǔ.
lines.english: I'm one meter seventy-five.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ de yǎnjing zhēn dà.
lines.english: Your eyes are really big.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Shì ma? Xièxie.
lines.english: Really? Thanks.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ dài yǎnjing ma?
lines.english: Do you wear glasses?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Bú dài, wǒ de yǎnjing hěn hǎo.
lines.english: No, my eyes are good.

title: 我把礼物放在桌子上了
title_pinyin: Wǒ bǎ lǐwù fàng zài zhuōzi shàng le
title_english: I put the gift on the table

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我把礼物放在桌子上了。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ bǎ lǐwù fàng zài zhuōzi shàng le.
lines.english: I put the gift on the table.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Nǎge zhuōzi?
lines.english: Which table?

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Kètīng nàge dà zhuōzi.
lines.english: The big table in the living room.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ yīhuìr qù ná.
lines.english: Okay, I'll go get it in a moment.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Qǐng bǎ mén guānshàng.
lines.english: Please close the door.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de.
lines.english: Okay.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Wàimiàn tài lěng le.
lines.english: It's too cold outside.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Shì de, jīntiān fēng hěn dà.
lines.english: Yes, the wind is strong today.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Wǒ bǎ shū huán gěi túshūguǎn le.
lines.english: I returned the book to the library.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Jǐ běn?
lines.english: How many?

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Sān běn.
lines.english: Three.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Nǐ jiè le shénme shū?
lines.english: What books did you borrow?

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Dōu shì Zhōngwén xiǎoshuō.
lines.english: All Chinese novels.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Wǒ bǎ zhàopiàn fā gěi nǐ le.
lines.english: I sent the photos to you.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Shōudào le, xièxie.
lines.english: Received them, thanks.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Zhàopiàn lǐ de rén nǐ rènshi ma?
lines.english: Do you know the people in the photos?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Rènshi, dōu shì wǒ de tóngxué.
lines.english: Yes, they're all my classmates.

title: 你怎么不开灯
title_english: Why don't you turn on the light

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zěnme bù kāi dēng?
lines.english: Why don't you turn on the light?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我在想事情，没注意天黑了。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zài xiǎng shìqing, méi zhùyì tiān hēi le.
lines.english: I was thinking about something, didn't notice it got dark.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nà wǒ bāng nǐ kāi dēng ba.
lines.english: Let me turn on the light for you.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Xièxie.
lines.english: Thanks.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zěnme bú shuìjiào?
lines.english: Why aren't you sleeping?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒ hái bú kùn.
lines.english: I'm not sleepy yet.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Yǐjīng shí'èr diǎn le.
lines.english: It's already twelve o'clock.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Zài kàn shí fēnzhōng jiù qù shuì.
lines.english: Ten more minutes of reading then I'll sleep.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zěnme bù chī zǎofàn?
lines.english: Why aren't you eating breakfast?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒ chīguò le.
lines.english: I already ate.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ jǐ diǎn chī de?
lines.english: What time did you eat?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 七点，今天要早点儿去公司。
lines.pinyin: Qī diǎn, jīntiān yào zǎo diǎnr qù gōngsī.
lines.english: At seven, I need to go to the office early today.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zěnme bù shuōhuà?
lines.english: Why aren't you talking?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zài tīng nǐ shuōhuà ne.
lines.english: I'm listening to you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Yǒu shénme wèntí ma?
lines.english: Is there a problem?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 没有，我只是在想你说的话。
lines.pinyin: Méiyǒu, wǒ zhǐ shì zài xiǎng nǐ shuō de huà.
lines.english: No, I'm just thinking about what you said.

title: 这件衬衫有点儿大
title_pinyin: Zhè jiàn chènshān yǒu diǎnr dà
title_english: This shirt is a bit too big

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Zhè jiàn chènshān yǒu diǎnr dà.
lines.english: This shirt is a bit too big.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Nǐ shìshi nà jiàn xiǎo de.
lines.english: Try the smaller one.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 那件是白色的，我喜欢这件蓝色的。
lines.pinyin: Nà jiàn shì báisè de, wǒ xǐhuan zhè jiàn lánsè de.
lines.english: That one is white, I like this blue one.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 那问问服务员有没有小一号的。
lines.pinyin: Nà wènwen fúwùyuán yǒu méiyǒu xiǎo yī hào de.
lines.english: Then ask the clerk if they have one size smaller.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Zhè tiáo kùzi yǒu diǎnr cháng.
lines.english: These pants are a bit long.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Kěyǐ gǎi duǎn.
lines.english: They can be shortened.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǎlǐ kěyǐ gǎi?
lines.english: Where can they be altered?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Lóuxià yǒu gè cáifeng diàn.
lines.english: There's a tailor shop downstairs.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Zhège yánsè tài liàng le.
lines.english: This color is too bright.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Nà zhège yánsè zěnmeyàng?
lines.english: How about this color?

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Zhège hǎo, kàn qǐlái hěn shūfu.
lines.english: This is good, it looks comfortable.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 而且这个颜色很适合你。
lines.pinyin: Érqiě zhège yánsè hěn shìhé nǐ.
lines.english: And this color suits you very well.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Zhè shuāng xié yǒu diǎnr jǐn.
lines.english: These shoes are a bit tight.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Shìshi dà bàn hào de.
lines.english: Try a half size larger.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ shìshi.
lines.english: Okay, I'll try.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 买鞋一定要舒服，不能只看好看。
lines.pinyin: Mǎi xié yídìng yào shūfu, bù néng zhǐ kàn hǎokàn.
lines.english: When buying shoes, they must be comfortable, not just good-looking.

title: 我看不太清楚
title_english: I can't see very clearly

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Wǒ kàn bú tài qīngchu.
lines.english: I can't see very clearly.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Shì bu shì yǎnjing lèi le?
lines.english: Are your eyes tired?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 可能是，看了一下午书了。
lines.pinyin: Kěnéng shì, kàn le yī xiàwǔ shū le.
lines.english: Maybe, I've been reading all afternoon.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 休息一下吧，让眼睛放松放松。
lines.pinyin: Xiūxi yīxià ba, ràng yǎnjing fàngsōng fàngsōng.
lines.english: Take a rest, let your eyes relax.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ tīng de qīngchu ma?
lines.english: Can you hear clearly?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 听不太清楚，声音太小了。
lines.pinyin: Tīng bú tài qīngchu, shēngyīn tài xiǎo le.
lines.english: Not very clearly, the volume is too low.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Wǒ bǎ shēngyīn tiáo dà yīdiǎn.
lines.english: I'll turn up the volume.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Hǎo le, xiànzài qīngchu le.
lines.english: Okay, it's clear now.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ kàn de dǒng zhège zì ma?
lines.english: Can you understand this character?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Kàn bù dǒng, zhè shì shénme zì?
lines.english: No, what character is this?

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Zhè shì 'nán', kùnnán de yìsi.
lines.english: This is 'nán', meaning difficult.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Yuánlái shì zhèyàng, wǒ jìzhù le.
lines.english: I see, I'll remember it.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Zhèlǐ xiě de bú tài qīngchu.
lines.english: This is written unclearly.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Nǎge dìfang?
lines.english: Which part?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 这里，我看不清楚你写的是什么。
lines.pinyin: Zhèlǐ, wǒ kàn bù qīngchu nǐ xiě de shì shénme.
lines.english: Here, I can't see clearly what you wrote.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒ chóngxīn xiě yī biàn ba.
lines.english: Let me write it again.

title: 别把自行车放在门口
title_pinyin: Bié bǎ zìxíngchē fàng zài ménkǒu
title_english: Don't put the bicycle at the entrance

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Bié bǎ zìxíngchē fàng zài ménkǒu.
lines.english: Don't put the bicycle at the entrance.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Nà wǒ fàng nǎr?
lines.english: Then where should I put it?

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Fàng dào nàbiān de chēpéng lǐ qù.
lines.english: Put it in the bicycle shed over there.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ mǎshàng qù.
lines.english: Okay, I'll go right away.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Bié bǎ lājī rēng zài dìshàng.
lines.english: Don't throw trash on the ground.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 对不起，我没看到垃圾桶。
lines.pinyin: Duìbuqǐ, wǒ méi kàndào lājītǒng.
lines.english: Sorry, I didn't see the trash can.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Lājītǒng zài zuǒbiān.
lines.english: The trash can is on the left.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Kàndào le, xièxie tíxǐng.
lines.english: I see it, thanks for the reminder.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Bié zài zhèlǐ xīyān.
lines.english: Don't smoke here.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Zhèlǐ bù néng xīyān ma?
lines.english: Can't smoke here?

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Shì de, zhè shì gōnggòng chǎngsuǒ.
lines.english: That's right, this is a public place.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Hǎo, wǒ qù wàimiàn xī.
lines.english: Okay, I'll go outside to smoke.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Bié bǎ shuǐ sǎ zài dìbǎn shàng.
lines.english: Don't spill water on the floor.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎoxīn de.
lines.english: I'm being careful.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Dìbǎn gāng cāguò, hěn gānjìng.
lines.english: The floor was just mopped, it's very clean.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Fàngxīn, wǒ huì zhùyì de.
lines.english: Don't worry, I'll be careful.

title: 我忘了带钱包
title_english: I forgot to bring my wallet

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Wǒ wàng le dài qiánbāo.
lines.english: I forgot to bring my wallet.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Méi guānxi, wǒ dài qián le.
lines.english: It's okay, I brought money.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nà zěnme hǎoyìsi ne?
lines.english: How can I accept that?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Xià cì nǐ qǐng wǒ jiù xíng le.
lines.english: You can treat me next time.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我忘了你的电话号码了。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ wàng le nǐ de diànhuà hàomǎ le.
lines.english: I forgot your phone number.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zài shuō yī biàn, nǐ jì yīxià.
lines.english: I'll say it again, write it down.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, nǐ shuō ba.
lines.english: Okay, go ahead.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 一三八一一三三七八九零。
lines.pinyin: Yāo sān bā yāo yāo sān sān qī bā jiǔ líng.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ wàng le guān dēng le.
lines.english: You forgot to turn off the light.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Wǒ qù kànkan.
lines.english: Really? Let me check.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 确实没关，你去关一下吧。
lines.pinyin: Quèshí méi guān, nǐ qù guān yīxià ba.
lines.english: It's indeed not off, go turn it off.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, xièxie nǐ tíxǐng wǒ.
lines.english: Okay, thanks for reminding me.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Wǒ wàng le zhè jiàn shì le.
lines.english: I forgot about this matter.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Shénme shì?
lines.english: What matter?

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Míngtiān yào kāihuì de shì.
lines.english: The meeting tomorrow.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我也差点忘了，谢谢你提醒。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yě chàdiǎn wàng le, xièxie nǐ tíxǐng.
lines.english: I almost forgot too, thanks for reminding me.

title: 我应该早点儿来
title_english: I should have come earlier

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yīnggāi zǎo diǎnr lái.
lines.english: I should have come earlier.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wèishénme?
lines.english: Why?

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Lái wǎn le, méiyǒu zuòwèi le.
lines.english: I came late, there are no seats left.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 没关系，我们可以站着看。
lines.pinyin: Méi guānxi, wǒmen kěyǐ zhàn zhe kàn.
lines.english: It's okay, we can watch standing.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yīnggāi xiān wèn nǐ yīxià.
lines.english: I should have asked you first.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Shénme shì?
lines.english: About what?

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Wǒ mǎi cuò le piào.
lines.english: I bought the wrong ticket.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Méi guānxi, kěyǐ huàn.
lines.english: It's okay, we can exchange it.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Wǒ bú yìnggāi shuō nà jù huà.
lines.english: I shouldn't have said that.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de yě méi cuò.
lines.english: What you said wasn't wrong either.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Dànshì tā hǎoxiàng bù gāoxìng le.
lines.english: But he seems unhappy.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒ qù bāng nǐ jiěshì yīxià.
lines.english: I'll go help you explain.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yīnggāi duō dài diǎnr qián.
lines.english: I should have brought more money.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Bú gòu ma?
lines.english: Not enough?

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Zhège bǐ wǒ xiǎng de guì.
lines.english: This is more expensive than I thought.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒ xiān jiè gěi nǐ ba.
lines.english: I'll lend you some first.

title: 谁比谁高
title_english: Who is taller than whom

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ bǐ nǐ gēge gāo ma?
lines.english: Are you taller than your brother?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Méiyǒu, tā bǐ wǒ gāo.
lines.english: No, he's taller than me.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Tā duō gāo?
lines.english: How tall is he?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Yī mǐ bā, bǐ wǒ gāo wǔ límǐ.
lines.english: One meter eighty, five centimeters taller than me.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Jīntiān bǐ zuótiān lěng.
lines.english: Today is colder than yesterday.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Shì de, jīntiān líng xià wǔ dù.
lines.english: Yes, today is minus five degrees.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Míngtiān huì gèng lěng ma?
lines.english: Will it be even colder tomorrow?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 天气预报说明天会暖和一点儿。
lines.pinyin: Tiānqì yùbào shuō míngtiān huì nuǎnhuo yīdiǎnr.
lines.english: The forecast says tomorrow will be a bit warmer.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ de Zhōngwén bǐ yǐqián hǎo le.
lines.english: Your Chinese is better than before.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Xièxie.
lines.english: Really? Thanks.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ měitiān xuéxí duō cháng shíjiān?
lines.english: How long do you study every day?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 两个小时左右，比以前多。
lines.pinyin: Liǎng gè xiǎoshí zuǒyòu, bǐ yǐqián duō.
lines.english: About two hours, more than before.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Zhè jiàn yīfu bǐ nà jiàn hǎokàn.
lines.english: This piece of clothing is better-looking than that one.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Dànshì zhè jiàn bǐ nà jiàn guì.
lines.english: But this one is more expensive than that one.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 贵也没关系，我喜欢这个颜色。
lines.pinyin: Guì yě méi guānxi, wǒ xǐhuan zhège yánsè.
lines.english: It doesn't matter if it's expensive, I like this color.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Nà jiù mǎi zhè jiàn ba.
lines.english: Then buy this one.

title: 我受到了表扬
title_english: I received praise

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Wǒ shòudào le biǎoyáng.
lines.english: I received praise.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wèishénme?
lines.english: Why?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我的项目完成了，老板很高兴。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ de xiàngmù wánchéng le, lǎobǎn hěn gāoxìng.
lines.english: My project was completed, the boss is very happy.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Gōngxǐ nǐ! Zuò de hǎo!
lines.english: Congratulations! Well done!

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ shòudào le pīpíng ma?
lines.english: Did you receive criticism?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Shì de, wǒ chídào le.
lines.english: Yes, I was late.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Xià cì zhùyì yīxià.
lines.english: Be careful next time.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒ huì de, yǐhòu bú chídào le.
lines.english: I will, I won't be late anymore.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Lǎoshī biǎoyáng le nǐ de zuòwén.
lines.english: The teacher praised your composition.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Xiě de shénme?
lines.english: Really? What did they say?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 老师说你的文章写得很清楚。
lines.pinyin: Lǎoshī shuō nǐ de wénzhāng xiě de hěn qīngchu.
lines.english: The teacher said your article is written very clearly.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Tài hǎo le, wǒ jìxù nǔlì.
lines.english: Great, I'll keep working hard.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ shòudàoguò shénme jiǎnglì?
lines.english: Have you received any awards?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 去年得到了优秀员工奖。
lines.pinyin: Qùnián dédào le yōuxiù yuángōng jiǎng.
lines.english: Last year I got the excellent employee award.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Zhēn bàng!
lines.english: That's great!

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 谢谢，我会继续努力工作。
lines.pinyin: Xièxie, wǒ huì jìxù nǔlì gōngzuò.
lines.english: Thanks, I'll continue to work hard.

title: 我还没决定
title_english: I haven't decided yet

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zhōumò qù bu qù lǚyóu?
lines.english: Are you going traveling this weekend?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒ hái méi juédìng.
lines.english: I haven't decided yet.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 想去的话，我们一起去吧。
lines.pinyin: Xiǎng qù de huà, wǒmen yīqǐ qù ba.
lines.english: If you want to go, let's go together.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Hǎo, wǒ xiǎngxiang zài gàosu nǐ.
lines.english: Okay, I'll think about it and tell you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ juédìng mǎi nǎge le méiyǒu?
lines.english: Have you decided which one to buy?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Hái méi ne, liǎng gè dōu búcuò.
lines.english: Not yet, both are good.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ xǐhuan nǎge yánsè?
lines.english: Which color do you like?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒ bǐjiào xǐhuan hóngsè de.
lines.english: I prefer the red one.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你决定学什么专业了没有？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ juédìng xué shénme zhuānyè le méiyǒu?
lines.english: Have you decided what major to study?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Juédìng le, wǒ xiǎng xué jìsuànjī.
lines.english: Decided, I want to study computer science.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Wèishénme xuǎn zhège?
lines.english: Why did you choose this?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒ duì jìsuànjī hěn gǎn xìngqù.
lines.english: I'm very interested in computers.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你决定什么时候走了没有？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ juédìng shénme shíhou zǒu le méiyǒu?
lines.english: Have you decided when to leave?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Juédìng le, xià zhōuliù zǒu.
lines.english: Decided, leaving next Saturday.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nà wǒ sòng nǐ qù jīchǎng ba.
lines.english: Then let me take you to the airport.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Tài hǎo le, xièxie nǐ!
lines.english: Great, thank you!

title: 他正在打电话
title_english: He is making a phone call

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Tā zhèngzài dǎ diànhuà.
lines.english: He is making a phone call.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Nà děng tā dǎ wán zài shuō ba.
lines.english: Then let's wait until he finishes.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ qù hē bēi kāfēi.
lines.english: Okay, I'll go have a cup of coffee.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yě yào yī bēi.
lines.english: I want one too.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zhèngzài zuò shénme?
lines.english: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zhèngzài xiě zuòyè.
lines.english: I'm doing homework.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Shénme shíhou néng xiě wán?
lines.english: When can you finish?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Dàgài hái yào bàn gè xiǎoshí.
lines.english: Probably another half hour.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Tāmen zhèngzài kāihuì.
lines.english: They are having a meeting.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Huìyì jǐ diǎn kāishǐ?
lines.english: What time did the meeting start?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 两点开始的，现在还没结束。
lines.pinyin: Liǎng diǎn kāishǐ de, xiànzài hái méi jiéshù.
lines.english: Started at two, still hasn't ended.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Kànlái shì gè zhòngyào de huìyì.
lines.english: Seems like an important meeting.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Wàimiàn zhèngzài xià yǔ.
lines.english: It's raining outside.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Dà ma?
lines.english: Heavily?

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Bú dà, shì xiǎo yǔ.
lines.english: No, it's light rain.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Nà bú yòng dānxīn, wǒ dài sǎn le.
lines.english: Then no need to worry, I brought an umbrella.
